previewText: Low views can come from weak packaging, low impressions, or poor retention after the clic…
intro: This week on InstantViral Learn: Why YouTube Views May Be Low. Low views can come from weak packaging, low impressions, or poor retention after the click. Separate CTR problems from retention problems before changing everything.
mainSummary: Low views can come from weak packaging, low impressions, or poor retention after the click. Separate CTR problems from retention problems before changing everything.
keyTakeaways: Do not chase every metric at once
